ques: Identify the most recent development or update in Brexit negotiations as reported on BBC News and report the key points and any stated impacts on European economies.
answer: The most recent Brexit development on BBC News (19 Mar 2026) is "Sadiq Khan says Labour should pledge to rejoin EU." Key points: London Mayor Sir Sadiq Khan urged Labour to campaign at the next election (≈2029) on rejoining the EU, customs union and single market, calling re-entry "inevitable" (possibly without a referendum); Downing Street rejected this, ruling out rejoining the single market/customs union; Conservatives/Reform opposed it while Greens and Lib Dems backed closer ties. Stated economic impacts center on the UK and UK–EU trade: Khan cited economic/social/cultural "damage" to London worsened by US tariffs and the Iran war, and Sir John Major cited ~£100bn lost annual European trade and £40bn lost tax revenue, with Lib Dems saying a customs union would restore growth and revenue.
